arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka reveals Arsenal's Martin Odegaard replacement plan amid Man City criticism
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka has said that Arsenal must find a way to cope without Martin Odegaard ahead of their top of the table clash with Manchester City. In his absence the Gunners have been able to secure a 1-0 win over Tottenham in the North London Derby and a 0-0 draw in Bergamo against the Europa League champions.

City meanwhile, are also unbeaten and can return to the top of the Premier League table if they avoid defeat, though they come into the game having failed to score in a European clash against Inter earlier this week.

arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has leapt to the defence of Manchester City and the reaction to their performances this week against Brentford and Inter Milan - by sending a cheeky dig at their rivals using the club's 115 Premier League charges.
